PostToolUse.description: After writing/saving an .SRT file, prompt to run srt-corrector skill

hooks.statusMessage: Checking quality gates on output file...

PreToolUse.description: Machine-enforce Gate 1 (banned words), Gate 2 (entity), Gate 11 (no-send) on any Write/Edit under claude-social-media-manager/output/. HARD gate fails block the write via exit 2.
